item.title: Thank god, indeed, that @ylecun publicly stood up and admitted he was wrong, to fight for the greate...
item.description:
Thank god, indeed, that @ylecun publicly stood up and admitted he was wrong, to fight for the greater good.
Oh wait.
--- @GaryMarcus | ❤️ 2 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 733
item.author: @GaryMarcus

item.title: impossible to imagine openai succeeding without greg!
item.author: @sama

item.title:
it has been a real pleasure to work with Greg over the past decade. i feel very lucky.
this post he...
item.description:
it has been a real pleasure to work with Greg over the past decade. i feel very lucky.
this post held up pretty well, but not did not sufficiently highlight his technical brilliance and sheer determination.
https://t.co/wi03SGDLjU
--- @sama | ❤️ 601 | 🔁 26 | 💬 135 | 👁 34721
item.author: @sama

item.title: Releasing a skill to help build LLM Wikis.
item.author: @dair_ai

item.title:
How to keep your agents running even when your macbook lid is closed:
1. Go to Mac App Store and do...
item.description:
How to keep your agents running even when your macbook lid is closed:
1. Go to Mac App Store and download Amphetamine
2. Go to Settings → Session Defaults → uncheck everything below
You're welcome :) https://t.co/mRVEq7c7Ly
--- @petergyang | ❤️ 26 | 🔁 5 | 💬 9 | 👁 2747
item.author: @petergyang
